name: io.github.AIDataNordic/nordic-financial-mcp
description: Semantic search across 570,000+ Nordic financial documents — company filings, press releases, macro data and real-time electricity prices for Norway, Sweden, Denmark and Finland.

tools.name: search_filings
tools.description: Primary search tool for Nordic financial data. Semantic search over 570,000+ vectors from company filings (annual/quarterly), press releases, exchange announcements and macro summaries for NO, SE, DK and FI. Supports filtering by ticker, country, report_type and fiscal_year. Returns reranked text excerpts with metadata. Use for any question about Nordic companies or macro conditions. Do not use to retrieve full documents — use parse_pdf_to_text for that.

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Look up a company in the official business registry for Norway (Brønnøysund), Denmark (CVR) or Finland (PRH). Returns legal name, status and address. Use for known organisation numbers. Not available for Sweden (SE) — use search_filings instead. Returns an error dict if the company is not found or the registry is unavailable.

tools.name: get_current_power_price
tools.description: Fetch today's hourly day-ahead electricity spot prices in EUR/kWh for any Nordic bidding zone (NO1–NO5, SE1–SE4, DK1, DK2, FI). Returns current-hour price, full hourly schedule and daily stats. Tomorrow's prices are available after ~13:00 CET. For historical price context, use search_filings with report_type='macro_summary'.

tools.name: parse_pdf_to_text
tools.description: Download a publicly accessible PDF and extract all text page by page. Use to read the full content of a specific document (e.g. an annual report PDF linked from a search_filings result). Not suitable for scanned image PDFs. Do not use for documents already well-indexed in the database — search_filings is faster for those.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Connectivity check that confirms the server process is responding. Use to verify the server is reachable before starting a workflow. Does not confirm database availability — call search_filings directly to verify data access.
